item.title: Simda.js, A light-weight alternative of Ramda.js
item.author: neotan.github.io
item.description: Simda.jsA light-weight alternative (in ES6+) of Ramda.js Installation1 npm i simda Usage1 2 3 4 import * as S from 'simda' const newObj = S.assocPath(['a', 1, 'c'], 999)({a: [{b: 111}]}) console.log(newObj) // => {a:[{b:111},{c:999}]}
